scripts.build: vite build --emptyOutDir && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir . --filename bbot-scanner.xpi --overwrite-dest
scripts.dev:firefox: vite build --emptyOutDir && mkdir -p "$HOME/tmp-web-ext" && TMPDIR="$HOME/tmp-web-ext" DISPLAY="${DISPLAY:-:0}" GDK_BACKEND="${GDK_BACKEND:-x11}" MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND="${MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND:-0}" web-ext run --source-dir dist --firefox "${FIREFOX_BIN:-$HOME/.local/bin/firefox-local}" --verbose
